case_title: PARKMERCED INVESTORS PROPERTIES LLC, A DELAWARE VS. YURIY GARPARYAN et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED INVESTORS PROPERTIES LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARPARYAN, YURIY AN INDIVIDUAL GASPARYAN, YELENA AN INDIVIDUAL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 350 ARBALLO DRIVE, #10-L SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94132, **INCLUDING ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES**
